title: Junior Network Engineer
description:
Position Overview


We are seeking a passionate and proactive Junior Network Engineer to join our rapidly growing team in Singapore. You will work closely with senior engineers to maintain and optimize the network environments of our core clients—especially top-tier banks and financial institutions—and participate in delivering impactful network projects.


We value strong foundational IT knowledge and professional work ethics, which will be key to your success and long-term growth with us.
Outstanding students looking for internship opportunities are also welcome to apply.


Key Responsibilities

Network Support and Maintenance

  • Serve as first- or second-level support to respond to and resolve clients’ daily network requests and incidents in a clear and professional manner.
  • Conduct regular network health checks and inspections with precision and complete all related technical documentation accurately.
  • Assist in monitoring clients’ network performance, proactively report anomalies, and ensure network stability and availability.

Project Delivery and Implementation

  • Under the guidance of senior engineers, assist in on-site implementation of client network projects, including basic configuration and testing.
  • Demonstrate a strong sense of responsibility by ensuring implementation processes comply with standards and maintain detailed project documentation throughout.

Operations Collaboration and Learning

  • Work closely with the team and demonstrate strong teamwork and resilience when handling critical incidents.
  • Maintain a strong desire to learn, proactively master mainstream network technologies and operational processes, and prepare for relevant professional certifications.

Requirements


Education and Experience

  • Diploma or higher in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related fields.
  • 1–2 years of relevant work experience, or outstanding fresh graduates with strong learning ability and hands-on spirit.
  • Possession of HCIA, CCNA, or equivalent network certification is preferred.

Technical Skills


Core Networking

  • Solid understanding of TCP/IP, OSPF, BGP, VLAN, STP, and other core network principles.
  • Basic configuration and troubleshooting skills for mainstream network devices (e.g., Huawei, Cisco).

Systems and Security Fundamentals (Preferred)

  • Basic understanding of Windows Server and/or Linux systems, including common commands.
  • Awareness of fundamental network security concepts, including firewall policies and ACLs.
  • Familiarity with ITIL or other standard IT operations frameworks is an advantage.

Core Competencies and Soft Skills

  • Meticulous and disciplined: Strong attention to detail, adherence to procedures, and documentation accuracy.
  • Excellent learning and adaptability: Quick to grasp new technologies and processes; able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
  • Clear communication and teamwork: Strong written and verbal communication skills; effective collaboration with teammates and clients.
  • Customer service mindset and accountability: Understand the importance of client satisfaction; take full ownership of assigned tasks and issues.
  • Process-driven and organized: Good time management and multitasking abilities with a structured approach to work.

What We Offer

  • A fast-growing platform with opportunities to work directly with international top-tier banking clients.
  • Hands-on exposure to large-scale and complex network projects under the guidance of experienced engineers.
  • A clear career development path and ongoing technical training support.
  • Competitive salary and benefits package.
  • Internship opportunities with potential conversion to full-time roles based on performance.

postedCompany.description:
Comservice (Singapore) Solutions Pte. Ltd.(CCSSG), a wholly-owned subsidiary of China Communications Services Corporation Limited (CCS), was incorporated in Singapore in Y2013.

CCS, a state-owned company, is listed on the main board of Hong Kong Exchange (HK.552) in 2006. Our main shareholders include three main Chinese Telco carriers.

CCS is a Chinese Leading Service Provider in Information Technology and Communications Technology. With nearly 40 years solid professional experiences, CCS is providing full spectrum solutions and services in Telco, ICT and DC areas including the service of design, implementation, project management to the one of maintenance.

We, CCSSG as one of the overseas affiliates of CCS, will dedicate ourselves to serve our clients along with our parent company and to provide professional One-Stop Shop ICT solutions and global-delivered services to telco carriers, manufacturers, governments, media, science and technology business entities.
postedCompany.name: COMSERVICE (SINGAPORE) SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
